---
title: "_04_citing_studies"
author: "Josefina Weinerova"
date: "2025-10-05"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
# package loading
```{r}
if (!require(pacman)) install.packages("pacman")

pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse, httr, jsonlite,
  purrr, dplyr, tibble, data.table,
  stringr
)

source("R/oc_helpers.R")
```

# Data loading

```{r load-data}
full_matched_df <- readRDS("data/full_matched_df.rds")
df_meta <- readRDS("data/metadata_OpenAlex.rds")
```

# Switch citation type

```{r switch}
# Choose citation type: "original" or "rep"
citation_type <- "rep"

cfg <- switch(citation_type,
  "original" = list(
    dois           = unique(full_matched_df$doi),
    outfile        = "citations_ControlGroup.csv",
    checkpoint_rds = "checkpoint_control.rds",
    failed_log     = "failed_dois_control.txt",
    extra_csv      = "citations_ControlGroup_2.csv", # set to NULL if no extra file
    out_rds        = "data/citations_OC.rds"
  ),
  "rep" = list(
    dois           = unique(df_meta$doi_r),
    outfile        = "citations_RepGroup.csv",
    checkpoint_rds = "checkpoint_rep.rds",
    failed_log     = "failed_dois_rep.txt",
    extra_csv      = NULL,
    out_rds        = "data/citations_OC_rep.rds"
  ),
  stop("Invalid citation_type. Choose 'original' or 'rep'.")
)

# Clean DOIs
dois <- cfg$dois %>%
  trimws() %>%
  (\(x) unique(x[!is.na(x) & nzchar(x)]))()

message("Citation type: ", citation_type)
message("Unique DOIs to query: ", length(dois))
```

# Run OpenCitations citing pipeline

```{r run-pipeline}
access_token <- Sys.getenv("OC_API_KEY")

run_oc_citing_pipeline(
  dois           = dois,
  access_token   = access_token,
  outfile        = cfg$outfile,
  checkpoint_rds = cfg$checkpoint_rds,
  failed_log     = cfg$failed_log
)
```

# Clean up

```{r clean-up}
citations <- read_csv(cfg$outfile)

# Append extra CSV if present (e.g. citations_ControlGroup_2.csv)
if (!is.null(cfg$extra_csv) && file.exists(cfg$extra_csv)) {
  citations_extra <- read_csv(cfg$extra_csv)
  citations <- rbind(citations, citations_extra)
  message("Appended extra file: ", cfg$extra_csv)
}

citations$year <- substr(citations$creation, 1, 4)

citations <- citations %>%
  filter(year <= 2025) %>%
  distinct(cited, citing, .keep_all = TRUE)

message("Final rows: ", nrow(citations))
message("Unique cited DOIs: ", length(unique(citations$cited)))
```

# Save

```{r save}
save_rds_atomic(citations, cfg$out_rds)
message("Saved to: ", cfg$out_rds)
```
